services.name: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) Services
services.heading: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) Services for AI Search Visibility
services.description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is the process of structuring content so that AI systems like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and Perplexity can extract, interpret, and cite your brand in generated answers. We structure and distribute your content to maximize the likelihood of being cited across AI answer engines.
painPoints: Not ranking or being cited in AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity)
Competitors appearing as the cited source for your target queries
Lack of structured content for LLM extraction and citation
No visibility into how your brand is referenced in AI-generated answers
solutions: Entity Mapping & Topical Authority Graph
Query Intent Clustering (Conversational + Informational)
Content Structuring for Extraction (Definitions, Lists, Tables)
Schema + Internal Linking for Context Reinforcement (see: AEO content checklist, AI citation strategy)
Distribution Layer (Indexing, Citability Signals)
Monitoring: AI Citation Tracking + SERP Overlap
proof: +42% increase in featured snippet wins (pilot client, SaaS vertical)
29% growth in long-tail AI-driven queries (internal experiment)
howToGetCited: Use clear, extractable definitions and direct answers above the fold
Format content with lists, tables, and bullet summaries
Add FAQ and Q&A sections with schema markup
Reinforce topical context with internal links (see: AEO content checklist, AI citation strategy)
Avoid overclaiming—focus on influence, not control of citations
Monitor for new citations and update content regularly
services.metaTitle: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) Services for AI Search Visibility | Generative Engine Optimization Agency
services.metaDescription: Maximize your brand's visibility in AI answer engines. AEO services for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity. Step-by-step frameworks, proof, and internal linking for GEO readiness.

services.name: SEO Revenue Strategy

services.description: Break free from vanity metrics. We build SEO infrastructures that prioritize Pipeline over Pageviews, aligning organic growth with bottom-line unit economics and CAC targets.
painPoints: High organic traffic volume but stagnant conversion and revenue
High CAC due to targeting low-intent keyword segments
Attribution blind spots preventing SEO-to-Revenue validation
Content strategy disconnected from Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) journeys
solutions: Revenue Impact Forecasting (RIF) modeling for organic investment
Multi-touch organic attribution mapping and funnel engineering
ICP-centric keyword mapping for high-intent capturing
Competitive revenue-gap analysis to identify missed market share
services.metaTitle: SEO Revenue Strategy | Pipeline-First Organic Growth
services.metaDescription: Stop tracking rankings, start tracking revenue. We build performance SEO strategies focused on pipeline and SQLs, not just traffic volume.

services.name: Technical SEO Audit
services.heading: Enterprise Technical SEO Audit
services.description: Eliminate the friction between your code and the crawler. We solve complex JS rendering gridlocks, crawl budget leaks, and semantic infrastructure issues at the scale of millions of pages.
painPoints: React/Next.js hydration delays impacting crawl efficiency and indexation
Crawl budget leakage on massive site architectures and faceted search
Missing semantic data moats that prevent AI engines from parsing features
Server-side performance bottlenecks impacting Core Web Vitals and LCP
solutions: Deep-dive Log File Analysis for crawler pattern recognition
SSR/SSG & Edge-side technical remediation for JS-heavy apps
Advanced Programmatic Schema architecture and Entity optimization
Custom Lighthouse/CWV performance optimization at the infrastructure level
services.metaTitle: Technical SEO Audit | Enterprise Scale Performance Remediation
services.metaDescription: Master Next.js & React SEO at scale. We resolve the technical gridlocks that prevent modern SaaS and eCommerce platforms from ranking.
